text:
TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: Missing/null = No coronary care indication C 
0 = General (revenue code 0210) 
1 = Myocardial (revenue code 0211) 
2 = Pulmonary care (revenue code 0212) 
3 = Heart transplant (revenue code 0213) 
4 = Intermediate CCU (revenue code 0214) 
9 = Other Coronary Care (revenue code 0219) 

COMMENT: This field is derived by checking for the presence of coronary care revenue center codes (021X) on any of 
the claim records included in the
